name: briefing_set_progress_and_sleep
description: Briefing::SetProgressAndSleep forwards progress to the runtime transport-progress SetNormalizedValue slot when a briefing runtime exists, then sleeps for 100 ms; with no runtime it only sleeps.
known_limits: The smoke verifies the transport-progress vtable slot dispatch and the null-runtime branch. It does not time the Sleep call beyond executing through the real provider.
VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through briefing_set_progress_and_sleep; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the Briefing runtime cluster.
